back_translation: And Israel dwelt in Shittim; and the people began to commit fornication with the daughters of Moab.
And they (the women) called the people to the sacrifices of their gods; and the people ate, and bowed down to their gods.
And Israel was joined to Baal of Peor; and the nose (anger) of the LORD burned against Israel.
And the LORD said to Moses: 'Take all the heads of the people, and impale them to the LORD before the sun, that the burning anger of the LORD may turn from Israel.'
And Moses said to the judges of Israel: 'Each kill his men who have joined themselves to Baal of Peor.'

And behold, a man from the sons of Israel came, and brought near to his brothers the Midianite woman, in the sight of Moses and in the sight of all the congregation of the sons of Israel — and they were weeping at the entrance of the Tent of Meeting.
And Phinehas son of Eleazar son of Aaron the priest saw, and rose up from the midst of the congregation, and took a spear in his hand.

And he came after the man of Israel into the tent (alcove), and he pierced the two of them — the man of Israel and the woman through her belly; and the plague was stopped from upon the sons of Israel.
And those who died in the plague were 24,000.
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
'Phinehas son of Eleazar son of Aaron the priest has turned My wrath from upon the sons of Israel, in his being zealous with My zeal among them; and I did not consume the sons of Israel in My zeal.'
'Therefore say: Behold, I give to him My covenant — peace.'
'And it shall be for him and for his seed after him a covenant of permanent priesthood, because he was zealous for his God, and made atonement for the sons of Israel.'
And the name of the man of Israel who was struck down, who was struck with the Midianite woman — Zimri son of Salu, leader of an ancestral house of the Simeonites.
And the name of the slain Midianite woman — Cozbi daughter of Zur; he was head of nations of an ancestral house in Midian.
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:

'For they are adversaries to you, in their deceits with which they deceived you, in the matter of Peor and in the matter of Cozbi daughter of the leader of Midian, their sister, who was struck on the day of the plague, in the matter of Peor.'
And it happened after the plague —
